name: Vegetable Pickle (Terkaree Ka Achar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash all the vegetables and cut into pieces. Dry on a cloth.
2. When all the vegetables are dry, mix salt and place in a large bowl. Set aside for about 2-3 days or until the vegetables become soft.
3. Mix in the lemon juice and set aside again.
4. Using 2 cups of oil, fry all the first group of spices (A) until light brown. Remove from the oil and grind to a smooth paste.
5. Heat the remaining oil in a large saucepan. Add 4 dried red chillies, the 2 teaspoons white cumin seeds, and the whole garlic cloves. Fry until light brown.
6. Add all the vegetables and all the ground spices and fry together for about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and allow to cool completely before placing in airtight containers. Store for up to 6-8 months.
